title: Minimum Absolute Difference in BST
hints: In a BST, an in-order traversal visits nodes in strictly increasing order. The minimum difference must occur between two adjacent values in this sorted sequence.
Perform an in-order traversal while keeping track of the previous node's value. Update the global minimum difference using the current and previous values.

Initialize a variable for the previous value to negative infinity and the minimum difference to infinity. During traversal, compute the absolute difference between the current and previous values, then update the minimum.
